name: claude-kit
description: Marketplace for claude-kit: shareable Claude Code skills, agents, and hooks.

plugins.name: claude-kit
plugins.description: Shareable Claude Code agent kit: orchestration, batch-dispatch, review, and memory/skill-hygiene skills plus critic/implementer agents. PR-workflow hooks ship separately as claude-kit-hooks.

plugins.name: claude-kit-hooks
plugins.description: PR-workflow and safety hooks from claude-kit: force-push guard, secret-read speed bump, pre-PR review gate, pre-PR docs freshness check, post-PR reflection. Skip this plugin if your project already registers its own equivalents — they would fire twice.
